sentence: I read a book about a big adventure in the forest.
cn_sentence: 我读了一本关于森林大冒险的书。

sentence: A pretty butterfly lands on the red flower in my garden.
cn_sentence: 一只漂亮的蝴蝶落在我花园里的红花上。

sentence: My dog is very clever and can open the door by himself.
cn_sentence: 我的狗非常聪明，能自己开门。

sentence: It is very hot in the desert and there is no water at all.
cn_sentence: 沙漠里非常炎热，一点水都没有。

sentence: I have lots of energy after I eat a good breakfast in the morning.
cn_sentence: 早上吃完丰盛早餐后我精力充沛。

sentence: My favorite food is pizza with lots of cheese on top.
cn_sentence: 我最喜欢的食物是上面有很多芝士的披萨。

sentence: My grandma grows carrots and tomatoes in her garden at home.
cn_sentence: 我奶奶在家里的花园种植胡萝卜和番茄。

sentence: I wear a helmet when I ride my bike to the park near my house.
cn_sentence: 我骑自行车去家附近的公园时戴头盔。

sentence: It is very important to drink enough water every day, especially when you play sports outside.
cn_sentence: 每天喝足够的水非常重要，尤其是在户外运动的时候。

sentence: We go on a long journey to visit my grandma in the city.
cn_sentence: 我们长途旅行去城里看望奶奶。

sentence: My mom cooks delicious food in the kitchen every evening.
cn_sentence: 妈妈每天晚上在厨房做美味的食物

sentence: We light a red lantern in the garden for the festival.
cn_sentence: 我们在花园里为节日点亮一盏红灯笼。

sentence: I have a happy memory of building a snowman with my dad.
cn_sentence: 我有一个和爸爸一起堆雪人的快乐回忆。

sentence: I like to read a storybook for fifteen minutes every night before I fall asleep.
cn_sentence: I see the blue ocean from my window when we go on vacation.

sentence: I see the blue ocean from my window when we go on vacation.
cn_sentence: 我们去度假时从窗户看到蓝色的大海。

sentence: I protect my little brother when we cross the busy street.
cn_sentence: 穿过繁忙马路的时候我保护弟弟。

sentence: The library is quiet so everyone can read their books.
cn_sentence: 图书馆很安静，这样每个人都能看书。

sentence: I remember to bring my homework to school every morning.
cn_sentence: 我每天早上记得带作业去学校。

sentence: I like to sing. I do it with my family.
cn_sentence: 我喜欢唱歌，我和家人一起唱。

sentence: Tomorrow is my best friend's birthday,so I  need to buy a nice gift for her after school.
cn_sentence: 明天是我好朋友的生日，所以我放学后要去给她买一份很棒的礼物。

sentence: I take my umbrella to school when the sky looks gray.
cn_sentence: 天空灰蒙蒙的时候我带雨伞去学校。

sentence: Welcome to visit my city,Xiangyang,and enjoy the delicious beef noodles.
cn_sentence: 欢迎到我的城市，襄阳，参观并品尝美味的牛肉面。

sentence: I wonder why the sky is blue and the grass is green.
cn_sentence: 我好奇天为什么是蓝的，草为什么是绿的。

sentence: Listening music can help us relax after a long day of study.
cn_sentence: 听音乐能帮助我们在漫长的学习日后放松。

sentence: My young brother likes to play with toy cars every day.
cn_sentence: 我弟弟每天都喜欢玩玩具汽车。

sentence: We plan to visit the zoo with my family this weekend.
cn_sentence: 我们计划这周末和家人一起去动物园。
